title: Crunchy Jamaican Tomato Stir-fry
description: A fresh and crunchy jamaican dish featuring a kid-friendly tomato sauce combined with healthy spices for a quick and easy meal.
instructions: Chop the tomatoes, onions, and jalapeno peppers into small pieces.
Finely chop the garlic cloves. If using jalapeno peppers, slice them thinly.
In a skillet or wok, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped tomatoes first, followed by the sliced onions and garlic if not using jalapenos as well.
Once everything is evenly distributed in the pan, season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Stir frequently until the tomatoes begin to break down into a sauce-like consistency and the vegetables are cooked through but still slightly crunchy.
If you want it spicier, add the sliced jalapeno peppers towards the end of cooking. Adjust seasoning as needed based on preference.
Serve hot over rice or with bread for a nutritious meal.
